world.title: Pope lashes out at foreigners who exploit Africa
world.description: Pope Leo XIV has criticised foreigners who exploit the wealth of Africa for profit during his visit to a conflict-hit region of Cameroon. It is one of several forthright remarks he has made over the last day, including blasting those who spend billions on wars and telling Cameroon’s government to root out corruption for peace […]

business.title: Is It Too Late To Consider Welltower (WELL) After Its Strong Multi‑Year Share Price Run?
business.description:
This article looks at what the current share price of Welltower might be implying, for investors wondering whether the stock is still attractively priced after a strong run or if most of the value is already on the table.
Welltower last closed at US$210.52, with returns of 1.4% over 7 days, 0.6% over 30 days, 12.6% year to date, 45.3% over 1 year, 197.5% over 3 years and 217.2% over 5 years. These figures naturally raise questions about what is currently built into the valuation.
Recent...

The $175.7 million launch contract, announced April 16, commits the […]

science.title: Indian scientists find data ‘fully consistent’ for dwarf galaxies to host black holes
science.description: A new study from Indian scientists probed the possibility of some of the smallest galaxies- dwarf spheroidal galaxies orbiting the Milky Way, hosting black holes and found data “fully consistent with the presence of intermediate-mass black holes,” an official statement said on Friday.
science.source: The Sentinel - of this Land, for its People

science.title: Sharks and tuna are overheating and running out of options
science.description: Some of the ocean’s fastest and most fearsome predators—like great white sharks and tuna—are running hotter than expected, and it’s costing them dearly. New research shows these warm-bodied fish burn nearly four times more energy than cold-blooded species, forcing them to eat more while also struggling to shed excess heat. As oceans warm, this creates a dangerous “double jeopardy”: rising temperatures push them closer to overheating, while shrinking food supplies make survival even harder.

ai.title: Meta set to fire 16000 employees in coming months, 8000 layoffs on May 20
ai.description: Meta is gearing up for another big round of layoffs, with about 8,000 employees expected to be cut starting May 20 and more cuts likely later in the year. The move comes as the company shifts focus heavily towards AI and tries to run leaner after years of aggressive hiring.

ai.title: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman Seeks Dismissal of Punitive Damages in Civil Suit Filed by Sister
ai.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has asked a federal court in Missouri to dismiss punitive damages claims in his sister Annie Altman’s civil lawsuit alleging sexual abuse, accusations he denies.

ai.title: Nova 2 Ultra: A Game-Changer in Affordable Smartphones
ai.description: Ai+ Smartphone introduces the Nova 2 Ultra, an innovative addition to the Nova Series. Available on Flipkart, this smartphone boasts a robust design, advanced camera features, and a flagship-grade display. With cutting-edge performance powered by MediaTek Dimensity 7400, it sets new standards for value and functionality.

ai.title: Ai+ Smartphone Nova 2 Ultra's Goes on Sale on FlipKart Starting April 17
ai.description: New Delhi [India], April 18: Ai+ Smartphone has announced the sale commencement of its latest device, Nova 2 Ultra, as part of the newly launched Nova Series. Designed as the most complete expression of the Nova lineup, the Nova 2 Ultra will be available exclusively on Flipkart and select retail outlets starting April 17 at 12 noon (Day 1 of Sales). Post Day 1, Nova 2 Ultra will again go on sale on April 24, 2026, giving an opportunity to the fans to catch hold of one of the most promising smartphones from the Ai+ Smartphone repertoire.

ai.title: OpenAI Launches AI Model GPT-Rosalind For Life Sciences Research
ai.description: OpenAI has unveiled GPT‑Rosalind, a new AI model focused on life sciences research. Named after Rosalind Franklin, the model supports biochemistry, drug discovery, and translational medicine by enabling evidence synthesis, hypothesis generation, and experimental planning.
